Release AAB build requested: 2026-07-09T18:00:00Z (v1.1.1 — the revenue release, r4: elegant baked skins + slimmer store + grand-finale win effect)
version: 1.1.1 (build name 1.1.1; versionCode = build-aab run number, strictly increasing)
signing: Play upload key SHA-1 EA:3B (from UPLOAD_* secrets / embedded)
package: com.whoisthere.app (matches Play Console)
note: v1.1.1 — REAL ADS ON (useTestAds=false; v1.0/v1.1.0 shipped with test
  ads = zero revenue), iOS SKAdNetwork ids, in-app review prompt, Firebase
  Analytics core events, feedback carries the device QA log, all pages on
  Firebase Hosting (repo-independent), new rewarded placements (daily double,
  hint unlock, loss consolation), FCM push for friend invites + requests,
  live cosmetics catalog (admin-controlled store items incl. Gemini board
  backgrounds + card backs; admin image wins over bundled), live-manifest
  self-heal, text scale clamped 0.85-1.1, birds+plants categories removed.
note-r3 (this build): 30 card-back skins BAKED into app assets (instant, no
  cloud read — fixes slow store), each skin image sliced across the board so
  the closed board forms one whole picture, disk-cache for any remaining
  network skin/board images, store preview shows the flat card image, host's
  card-back skin is shown to everyone in the room (monetization), admin:
  gallery upload + batch Gemini (cards + board backgrounds) + image shrink +
  full-bleed/price-scaled prompts + recently-connected users list + store ZIP
  export. lastSeenAt refreshed on every app open (admin "last connected").
note-r4 (this build): store cosmetics slimmed to WIN EFFECTS + CARD BACKS +
  BOARD SKINS + avatars (avatar FRAMES and NAME COLORS removed entirely from
  the store; names now render plain, avatars carry no frame ring). 25 elegant
  admin-generated skins BAKED into assets (14 card backs incl. the Israeli
  flag + 11 board backgrounds; each <250KB) so they load instantly with no
  cloud read — bundled asset always wins over any live imageUrl. New flagship
  premium win effect "מופע זיקוקים" (grand_finale): staggered multi-firework
  rockets + gold glow. (neon_wave/neon_cyber card images not yet generated —
  they still load live from the cloud until baked next pass.)
note2: versionCode auto = build-aab run number (strictly increasing; 25 used by v1.1.0).
